locator.quote: real regressions can hide behind known failures

text: Routinely skipping pre-existing failures erodes suite trust because real regressions can hide behind known failures.

locator.quote: the worker takes too long to start

text: The e2e WebSocket timeout fires because on Windows the worker takes too long to start (loading torch + initialising CUDA) within 30s.

locator.quote: skip if the specific columns are empty

text: Data-dependent tests should be conditional: skip if the specific columns are empty, not just if the table exists.
